steps.title: Factor out the common binomial
steps.content:
The expression $(x-k)$ appears in both terms. Factor it out:
$$0 = (x-k)(7x+t) - (x-k)$$
$$0 = (x-k)(7x + t - 1)$$

steps.title: Identify which solution corresponds to the given value
steps.content:
From the factored equation, solutions occur when either factor equals zero:
  • $x - k = 0 \Rightarrow x = k$
  • $7x + t - 1 = 0 \Rightarrow x = \frac{1-t}{7}$
Since $k$ is a positive constant and the given solution $-\frac{22}{7}$ is negative, it must come from the second factor:
$$\frac{1-t}{7} = -\frac{22}{7}$$
